name: Get_Project
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from main import utils_manager
class Get_ProjectNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Get_Project"

    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__(use_exec=False)
        self.add_exec_input("exec_in")
        self.add_exec_output("exec_out")
        self.icon_path = None
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("InProject", "string", widget_type="dropdown")
        self.add_output("OutProject", "string")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        try:
            self.utls_mgr = utils_manager.UtilsManager()
            check, projects = self.utls_mgr.get_all_projects()
            self.set_parameter("InProject", projects)
        except Exception as e:
            self.utls_mgr = None

    def on_plug_sync(self, port_name, is_input, other_node, other_port_name):
        data = other_node.get_parameter(other_port_name)
        self.log_info(f"Connected to {other_node.name} port '{other_port_name}'. Data: {data}")

    def on_unplug_sync(self, port_name, is_input):
        self.log_info(f"Disconnected {port_name}")

    async def on_plug(self, port_name, is_input, other_node, other_port_name):
        pass

    async def on_unplug(self, port_name, is_input):
        pass

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        InProject = inputs.get("InProject", "")
        await self.set_output("OutProject", InProject)
        await self.set_output("exec_out", True)
        return {"OutProject": InProject, "exec_out": True}

def register_node():
    return Get_ProjectNode
